{{Infobox location
| name = Mount Samara
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Mount Samara Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Mount [[Samara]] is the tallest of the four holy peaks located in [[Sacred Valley]] and stands to the east. The snow-covered mountain is characterized by a massive halo of white light, known as [[Samara]]’s ring, which circles its summit. Created by an expert centuries ago from bound [[light aura]], this halo appears at sunset and vanishes at sunrise, ensuring that [[Sacred Valley]] never experiences a dark night. This phenomenon has influenced the region by encouraging [[sacred artists]] to practice light-aspect arts, and the [[Heaven’s Glory School]] utilizes the ring's power to collect [[light aura]] even during moonless nights. The mountain features various landmarks, including a wide, polished white staircase that ascends the slopes in a straight line and the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]], a massive square mausoleum situated on the mountainside. The peak has also served as a site for combat, such as during an encounter involving the [[Winter Sage]]. The mountain's environment includes sparse slopes with occasional groves of twisted trees and a landscape that can be traversed by flying. The nature of the mountain has changed over time due to external forces. Originally powered by a [[Silent Core]], the ring's light was smooth and white; however, following shifts in power beneath the valley, the ring began to be fueled by different aspects of madra. Later, the ring transformed into a golden light crackling with blue lightning, powered by the [[Storm Core]]. Additionally, the mountain has suffered physical damage from a [[Titan]]'s attack, leaving its eastern slopes covered in rubble and bodies.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Located to the east, Mount [[Samara]] is the tallest of the four holy peaks and serves as the home of a heavenly guardian. The mountain's snow-blanketed slopes lead up to a summit encircled by a ring of pale white light. During their journey, [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] flew over the mountain's terrain before traveling down its slopes. [[Anses]] can be found positioned upon the peak of the mountain.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mount Samara]] contains a heavenly guardian.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mount Samara]] is the tallest of the four holy peaks and is located to the east.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mount Samara]] is blanketed in snow and has a ring of pale white light around its summit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are flying over the terrain of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] traveled down the slopes of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Anses]] is on the peak of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Mount Samara]] is a mountain located near the hills where [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are camping.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The characters are traveling through a forest after descending from [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Mount Samara]] has slopes where Sandviper soldiers are found.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located to the east near where [[Lindon]] first landed, Mount [[Samara]] is a mountain characterized by a fading ring. As the [[Kazan clan]] reached the site, desperate crowds were seen pushing up its sides and dashing down its slopes. The eastern slopes became covered in rubble and bodies, with many more found in the foothills after the [[Titan]] potentially crashed through the mountain. Although [[Lindon]] successfully reached the location, humans were seen fleeing down the slopes as [[Yerin]] hurtled into its side. Following these events, a halo of light surrounded the mountain while the [[Dreadgod]] eventually moved away.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] has a ring that was beginning to fade.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is a mountain near where [[Lindon]] landed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is located to the east.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Desperate people are dashing down the slopes of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|People were crossing the mountains east of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is a mountain that the [[Kazan clan]] reached.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is a location where a crowd was pushing up the side.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The eastern slopes of [[Mount Samara]] are covered in rubble and bodies.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] would reach [[Mount Samara]] in minutes if it continued walking.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Bodies were found in the foothills of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] may have crashed through [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Crowds were seen exiting [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is a location [[Lindon]] successfully reached.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Samara]] is surrounded by a halo of light.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Titan]] returned its attention to [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] hurtled into the side of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Dreadgod]] moved away from [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Humans are fleeing down [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mount Samara]] is a location where the [[Silent Core]] was kept.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The eastern chamber is buried beneath [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mount Samara]] and the [[island]] of the [[Silent Servants]] share a white halo of crystallized light madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Forces are creeping closer to [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mount Samara]] has a snow-capped passage on its top.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s portal looked out over the slopes of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelsa]]'s house is on [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|It told of the heavenly guardian within Mount Samara, and how enterprising disciples of the Heaven’s Glory School might earn a mark of its favor, and of the mythical “true badges” that amplified the power of human madra.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
